title: Zcash Foundation releases first stable, audited version of Zebra
contentSnippet: Zebra is an alternative Zcash node implementation that has been written in entirely in RUST. It can be used to join the Zcash peer-to-peer network, validate and broadcast transactions, and maintain the Zcash blockchain state in a distributed manner.

All About False Killer Whales
contentSnippet: Despite their dramatic name, false killer whales aren’t an orca species. These animals are dolphins—members of the same extended family as the iconic “killer whale” (Orcinus orca). title: Masseur charged over alleged client sex assault
contentSnippet: A massage therapist has been charged with sexual assault after allegedly attacking a female client during a reflexology appointment.

title: Germany news: Ships to head to Med for possible Hormuz role
contentSnippet: German Defense Minister Pistorius has said German naval ships will deploy to the Mediterranean. Berlin has pledged support in the Strait of Hormuz, post-war. DW has more.
